archimate:ArchimateModel.name: EDIC Local Digital Twin - Reference Architecture
archimate:ArchimateModel.purpose:
The EDIC Local Digital Twin - Reference Architecture describes the architectural choices for the LDT Citiverse EDIC.
It consists of: - A metamodel, to focus the architectural patterns being used for the reference architecture. - Level 0, motivational and strategy layers viewpoint. - Level 1, Strategy, Business layers viewpoint. - Level 2, Business to Application/Solution viewpoint. - Level 3, Conceptual Application and technology viewpoint.

properties.value: EDIC Local Digital Twin - Reference Architecture
reference architecture for the EDIC LDT Citiverse consortium
